title: Vehicle plunge into Knysna Lagoon, victim dies
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A man believed to be in his...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A man believed to be in his early seventies has died after his vehicle plunged into the Knysna Lagoon on Monday, 22 December 2025.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A man believed to be in his early seventies has died after his vehicle plunged into the Knysna Lagoon on Monday, 22 December 2025."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to police spokesperson Warrant Officer Spies, Knysna police have opened a culpable homicide docket following the incident, which occurred at approximately 14:00 on the N2 at the entrance to Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reports indicate that emergency services were dispatched to the scene after a Ford Ranger left the roadway and entered the lagoon.","html":"Reports indicate that emergency services were dispatched to the scene after a Ford Ranger left the roadway and entered the lagoon."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The body of the male driver was later recovered from the water. He was declared deceased at the scene by medical personnel.","html":"The body of the male driver was later recovered from the water. He was declared deceased at the scene by medical personnel."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An autopsy was conducted today to determine the exact cause of death. The circumstances surrounding the incident remain under investigation.","html":"An autopsy was conducted today to determine the exact cause of death. The circumstances surrounding the incident remain under investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Vehicle plunge into Knysna Lagoon, victim dies
